scripts.format: python3 -m ruff format src tests scripts && prettier --write AGENTS.md CLAUDE.md CONTRIBUTING.md README.md docs/**/*.md .github/**/*.md .github/workflows/*.yml configs/**/*.json data/**/*.json package.json opencode.json
scripts.format:check: python3 -m ruff format --check src tests scripts && prettier --check AGENTS.md CLAUDE.md CONTRIBUTING.md README.md docs/**/*.md .github/**/*.md .github/workflows/*.yml configs/**/*.json data/**/*.json package.json opencode.json
scripts.lint: python3 -m ruff check src tests scripts
scripts.validate:push: npm run format:check && npm run lint && npm run test && npm run smoke-test
